isolation.flowGuidance: Flow Validator Guidance: test-observability hooks (DEV only)

assertionResults.title: Timestamp format matches Paper
assertionResults.reason: Temporary executable test verified rendered .event-log-time text matches HH:MM:SS and validated the .event-log-time CSS declaration includes a monospace font stack.

steps.expected: Baseline suites pass before direct gap-closure checks
steps.observed: Baseline command exited 0 with 30/30 tests passing

steps.action: Run temporary gap-closure vitest test for VAL-EVENTLOG-008
steps.expected: HH:MM:SS row rendering and monospace declaration evidence both pass
steps.observed: Temporary command exited 0; VAL-EVENTLOG-008 test passed

assertionResults.title: Signing failure correlates to SigningFailedModal via request_id
assertionResults.reason: Temporary executable integration test confirmed the modal round request id and the Event Log expanded JSON request_id match for the same failure.

steps.action: Seed Dashboard state with one sign failure and one corresponding failure log row using request_id deadbeef
steps.expected: Modal and expanded row both expose the same request_id
steps.observed: Round field rendered r-deadbeef and expanded JSON contained "request_id": "deadbeef"

assertionResults.title: Nonce pool balancing events surface as SYNC
assertionResults.reason: Temporary executable test validated a SYNC row expands to payload JSON containing pool_size, delta, and peers keys.

steps.action: Render EventLogPanel with SYNC runtime row and expand it
steps.expected: Expanded JSON contains pool_size, delta, peers

assertionResults.title: Expand state persists across new event ingestion
assertionResults.reason: Temporary executable test verified an expanded target row stayed expanded after prepending newer rows and that a newly prepended row remained collapsed by default.

steps.action: Expand target row then rerender with newer prepended events
steps.expected: Target remains expanded and new row defaults collapsed
steps.observed: Target row aria-expanded stayed true; newest prepended row aria-expanded was false

assertionResults.title: Keyboard can expand / collapse rows
assertionResults.reason: Temporary executable test verified the expand control is a native keyboard-focusable button and aria-expanded toggles across Enter/Space activation semantics.

steps.action: Focus row expand control and execute Enter/Space activation flow
steps.expected: aria-expanded toggles true then false while focus remains on control
steps.observed: Control remained focused and aria-expanded toggled from false->true->false

frictions.description: The temporary keyboard assertion for VAL-EVENTLOG-022 runs in jsdom, which does not synthesize native click events from Enter/Space automatically, so activation semantics were exercised with explicit key events plus activation trigger in the test harness.
frictions.resolution: Recorded the jsdom constraint in evidence notes while still validating native button focusability and aria-expanded state transitions.
